hero_subheadline: ILAIKOTO delivers end-to-end software development, DevOps, cybersecurity, and AI automation to companies that need to move fast and stay secure.
services_title: Every layer of your stack, covered.
services_subtitle: From idea to infrastructure — we build it, secure it, and keep it running.
service_dev_desc: Custom web apps, mobile apps, and SaaS platforms built with modern stacks. We ship production-grade code, not prototypes.
service_devops_desc: CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, IaC, and security baked into every deployment. Faster releases, fewer incidents.
service_security_desc: Penetration testing, security audits, threat modeling, and compliance. We find vulnerabilities before attackers do.
service_ai_desc: LLM integrations, intelligent agents, data pipelines, and workflow automation. Turn repetitive processes into competitive advantages.
value1_text: Senior engineers and security specialists across every discipline we offer.
value2_text: Strategy, architecture, build, and ops — under one roof, one point of contact.
value3_text: We stay available after launch. Issues don't keep business hours and neither do we.
cta_title: Ready to build something that lasts?
cta_subtitle: Let's talk about your project. No commitment, no boilerplate pitch.
contact_subtitle: We'll get back to you within one business day.
form_message_placeholder: Tell us about your project, timeline, and goals.
